debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
⊢ sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) = ⊤

    simpa [hB N hN] using le_rfl

    refine top_unique ?_

    apply top_le_iff.mp

    apply sSup_le_sSup
    intro N hN
    rcases hN with ⟨N, hN, rfl⟩

    have hNle : N ≤ sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) := by

classical
    apply top_unique
    rw [sSup_le_iff]
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, x, hx⟩
    rcases x with ⟨hN, hx⟩
    have hNx : x ∈ B N hN := hx
    have hx_le : x ≤ sSup (B N hN) := le_sSup hNx
    have hN_le : N ≤ sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) := by
      have : B N hN ⊆ (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) := by
        intro y hy
        refine ⟨N, y, ?_⟩
        refine ⟨hN, ?_⟩
        exact hy
      exact (sSup_le_sSup this).trans_eq (by rfl) |> (fun h => (le_rfl : sSup (B N hN) ≤ sSup (B N hN)).trans h)
    have hx_le' : x ≤ N := by
      simpa [hB N hN] using hx_le
    exact le_trans hx_le' (le_trans (by simpa [hB N hN] using (le_rfl : N ≤ N)) hN_le)

classical
    apply top_le_iff.mp
    rw [← D.sSup_eq_top]
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_

    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hN with ⟨hN'D, hN⟩
    have h_le : sSup (B N' hN'D) ≤ N' := by
      rw [← hB N' hN'D]
    exact le_trans h_le (le_sSup hN'D)
